description: Micware Co., Ltd. provides software development services and information technology solutions focusing on the automotive and mobility sectors in Japan and internationally. The company operates three segments: Software Defined Vehicles, Location-Based Services, and Others. Its Software Defined Vehicles segment develops and sells software systems designed for SDV, including IVI system software and other mobility-enhancing software products.
